title: Rejuvenating Ethiopian Grana Stew
description: A herbal, glassy-jelly post-workout stew with grana padano, tempered chocolate and berbere spice, wrapped in lotus leaf for a refreshing finish.
instructions: Wash and pat dry the lotus leaves, then set aside.
Heat the sesame oil in a heavy pot over medium heat and sauté the diced carrot for 2 minutes.
Add the sliced zucchini and cauliflower florets to the pot and stir for 1 minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth and coconut milk, then bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in the berbere spice mix and let the stew cook for 15 minutes, allowing the vegetables to soften.
Add the grated grana padano and melted dark chocolate, stirring until the cheese melts and the stew becomes glossy.
Squeeze lemon juice into the stew and season with salt to taste.
Remove the pot from heat and let it cool slightly, then transfer the stew into the lotus leaf wraps, folding the leaves to seal.
Place the wrapped stew on a heatproof plate and serve warm, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Enjoy the refreshing, satvik-friendly stew as a revitalizing post-workout meal.
